note: Deterministic registry workflow (docs/registry/workflows.yaml). POST to the Deckhand workflow-API, or run the invocation locally; the embedded page is a representative live output of the workflow.
prompt: Monitor my drilling-riser operability and integrity from a telemetry track: show the operability margin, the flex-joint response with the measured-tracking correction, a wellhead bending-moment indicator, and the drift-off time-to-limit if thrusters were lost now.

how_to_run.step: Open @the_deckhand_bot and send: Monitor my drilling-riser operability and integrity from a telemetry track: show the operability margin, the flex-joint response with the measured-tracking correction, a wellhead bending-moment indicator, and the drift-off time-to-limit if thrusters were lost now.
POST /api/run with a scoped bearer token
